text: {"verdicts": [{"commitment_id": 1, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Daniel Cho confirmed Cirrus Analytics acquisition closed 'on schedule in the final week of fiscal Q3,' exactly as committed."},{"commitment_id": 2, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"},{"commitment_id": 3, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Helena Vargas stated Q3 non-GAAP operating margin was 19.2 percent, 'putting us on track to deliver full-year fiscal 2026 non-GAAP operating margin at approximately 19 percent.'"},{"commitment_id": 4, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Helena Vargas explicitly stated 'we did not achieve that commitment,' now guiding GAAP operating income to negative 25 to negative 40 million for FY2026."},{"commitment_id": 5, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Daniel Cho reaffirmed the Q4 2026 GA target for native Cirrus query capabilities, with Q4 deadline not yet closed."},{"commitment_id": 6, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"},{"commitment_id": 7, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Daniel Cho stated Stratus Copilot will miss Q4 2026 GA, now targeting Q2 2027, but Q4 2026 period has not yet closed."},{"commitment_id": 8, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas said EMEA is 'increasingly confident that mid-single-digit growth is achievable' in Q4, but Q4 has not yet closed."},{"commitment_id": 9, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas reaffirmed expectation to 'fully exhaust the 500 million dollar authorisation by the end of fiscal 2026,' with year-to-date at 285 million."},{"commitment_id": 10, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}]}
